cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this problem step by step. So, we have five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. The goal is to track who ends up with what after a series of swaps. Let me start by listing out the initial gifts: - Alice: Brown present - Bob: Orange ball - Claire: Green present - Dave: Blue present - Eve: White present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one and update who has which gift after each step. First swap: Eve and Bob swap their gifts. So, Eve originally had white, and Bob had orange. After swapping, Eve will have the orange ball, and Bob will have the white present. Let me note that down. After first swap (Eve and Bob): - Alice: Brown - Bob: White - Claire: Green - Dave: Blue - Eve: Orange Second swap: Eve and Claire swap. Now, Eve has orange, and Claire has green. After swapping, Eve will have green, and Claire will have orange. Let me update: After second swap (Eve and Claire): - Alice: Brown - Bob: White - Claire: Orange - Dave: Blue - Eve: Green Third swap: Eve and Dave swap. Now, Eve has green, Dave has blue.
